Doing the job well can require a lot of iterative feedback, so we're looking for someone who thinks critically about their writing and is always looking for ways to improve. Along the way, you'll also pick up a lot of knowledge about startups and startup law.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>The challenges never stop. </strong>The level of learning and craftsmanship that goes into writing responses to our customers requires intense focus. If you’re looking for the kind of position where you can easily master all the information at the beginning and work in a way that does not require intense focus, this position will probably not be a good fit for you. On the other hand, if you love learning and constantly challenging yourself, this position could be a good fit for you.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>There are often no right answers. </strong>We’re often not able to provide definitive answers to the questions we receive. In many cases, the best we can do is to equip our customers with the information they need to be able to figure out the right answer on their own, or to understand that it isn’t possible to figure out what the right answer is. If you prefer an environment more oriented around providing definitive answers, this position may not be a good fit for you.</div> </div> <div class="section page-centered"> <div> <h3>Minimum Requirements</h3> <div class="posting-requirements plain-list"> <div> <ul> <li>Genuine love for helping people</li> <li>High emotional intelligence</li> <li>Logical / analytical thinker</li> <li>Exceptional written English communication skills, including the ability to write precisely and succinctly</li> <li>Extremely detail-oriented</li> <li>Comfort with working remotely and independently</li> <li>Technologically savvy - you should be confident in your ability to use new software without training</li> <li>Appreciation for giving and receiving feedback often (often several times a day)</li> <li>Natural internal motivation to constantly strive for excellence in everything you do</li> </ul> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section page-centered"> <div> <h3>How We Work</h3> <div class="posting-requirements plain-list"> <div> <ul> <li>Clerky has been remote-first for many years, long before COVID. We’re very familiar with working remotely, and enjoy it.</li> <li>Our team is small, so everyone's contributions matter. We work efficiently, autonomously, and with great respect for each other.</li> <li>We work openly and collaboratively. We’re here to support you in being successful in this role. You'll work closely with other team members to ensure our customers are getting the best possible support and experience.</li> <li>Everyone on our team works hard, and we trust team members to know what will help them be most productive. Schedules are flexible as long as there is adequate team coverage.</li> <li>We want to help you grow, so we have a budget for books, courses, tools, or whatever other educational resources you need to be successful.</li> <li>We offer top-of-market compensation and benefits and the opportunity to learn a lot while helping our customers through an exciting time in their lives.</li> </ul> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section page-centered"> <div> <h3>Responsibilities</h3> <div class="posting-requirements plain-list"> <div> <ul> <li>Writing thoughtful and empathetic replies to customer emails using our help desk software, Help Scout</li> <li>Writing and maintaining help center articles, and identifying topics for new articles based on customer inquiries</li> <li>Working with our engineering team to debug software issues our customers encounter</li> <li>Using our software to develop and manage new ways for our customers to complete legal paperwork</li> <li>Assisting product team by testing new features and bug fixes, and conveying customer feedback</li> <li>Spotting trends in customer issues that other team members should be alerted to</li> </ul> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section page-centered"> <div>This is a 100% remote position.&nbsp; You'll be able to work from home (or from anywhere else).&nbsp; We offer top-of-market compensation and benefits, reasonable hours, and reasonable customers.&nbsp; No legal experience or background is necessary or preferred.<br><br></div> </div> <div class="section page-centered"> <div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses.
